response.original_title: The Boy Who Cried Wolf - and other Fabulous Fables
response.overview: The Boy Who Cried Wolf - The story of a shepherd boy who always calls for help needlessly. One day, when he really needs help, no one comes. (11 minutes)  The Two Spoiled Little Bears - Two little bears leave their mother and their home in the Valley of Dreams to travel and see the outside world. They begin to fight, something they promised their mother they would never do, and lose their way home. (11 minutes)  The Wolf and the Seven Kids - The story of a mother and her baby goats and how they outsmart the mean wolf. (11 minutes)
response.tagline: These animated stories will enchant and entertain your child over and over again
response.title: The Boy Who Cried Wolf - and other Fabulous Fables
